docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME, RESIDENCY VERIFIED, FILED BY PETITIONER RAMIREZ, JOANNE MICHELLE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER RAMIREZ, JOANNE MICHELLE HEARING SET FOR MAY-03-2016 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 514
PROOF OF PUBLICATION (THE BAY AREA REPORTER)
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER RAMIREZ, JOANNE MICHELLE
DECREE CHANGING NAME FILED BY PETITIONER RAMIREZ, JOANNE MICHELLE

NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2016, NAME CHANGE CALENDAR - GRANTED PER WRITTEN DECREE. HEARING NOT REQUIRED. PROOF OF PUBLICATION IN THE CASE FILE. IT APPEARS TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT THAT ALL THE CONTENTIONS IN THE PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME ARE TRUE AND CORRECT, AND THAT THE PETITION SHOULD BE GRANTED. THE COURT GRANTS PETITIONER'S REQUEST TO CHANGE HER NAME FROM JOANNE MICHELLE RAMIREZ, A/K/A JOANNE M. RAMIREZ, A/K/A JOANNE RAMIREZ, TO JOANNE MICHELE CUENCA. DECREE CHANGING NAME IS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN. CLERK: MEREDITH GRIER. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D514).
